name: California Check Cashing Stores
description_short: California Check Cashing Stores Los Angeles, California — California Check Cashing Stores offers check cashing, payday loans up to $250, bill pay, money...
description_long:
California Check Cashing Stores operates multiple locations throughout San Francisco, including branches at 2531 Mission Street, 1098 Market Street, and 5129 Mission Street. The company has positioned itself as a comprehensive money services provider serving the San Francisco community with extended hours and convenient access to financial products.

The company's core services include check cashing, payroll advances up to $250 (available in stores and online), bill payment, tax preparation, Western Union money transfers and money orders, and Green Dot Visa debit card distribution. They also offer reloadable debit cards. Loan applications require a government-issued photo ID, Social Security number, proof of income, checking account information, and proof of an open bank account. Applicants must be at least 18 years old.

California Check Cashing distinguishes itself through multiple physical locations in San Francisco, extended weekday hours (9 AM–7 PM Monday–Friday, 10 AM–4 PM Saturday), and the availability of online loan applications. The company explicitly references proximity to local landmarks and businesses (mentioning Evergreen Market near the Mission Street location) to emphasize community presence and accessibility.

The company carries standard disclaimers about loan eligibility being based on ability to repay and other underwriting criteria, with restrictions and fees applying. The website includes a consumer notice warning that small-dollar loans used over long periods can be expensive, and emphasizes that consumers should choose financial products matching their actual needs. No specific APR rates, fee structures, or loan terms are disclosed on the provided website content.
address: 3404 W Florence Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90043

company_info.headquarters: 3404 W Florence Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90043

pros: Multiple San Francisco locations (at least 3 store addresses listed) for convenient access
Extended weekday hours until 7 PM (Monday–Friday) accommodate working adults
Online loan applications available in addition to in-store services
Comprehensive money services under one roof: check cashing, bill pay, wire transfers, money orders, and tax prep
Payroll advances up to $250 available both in-store and online
Green Dot debit card distribution enables immediate account funding
Weekend hours (Saturday 10 AM–4 PM) provide access beyond standard business hours
cons: Payday loan terms and APR rates are not disclosed on the website, making comparison shopping difficult
Company website includes explicit warning that small-dollar loans used long-term can be expensive, suggesting high cost of borrowing
Loan eligibility criteria are vague ('ability to repay' and 'underwriting criteria') without clear guidelines on who qualifies
Payroll advance cap of $250 is very low for emergency cash needs
Not all products and services available at all locations, creating inconsistent service availability across branches
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked San Francisco residents needing immediate check cashing without a bank account
Working adults who need quick access to payroll advances between paychecks and can visit during extended weekday hours
Individuals requiring multiple money services (bill pay, wire transfers, money orders) at a single location
People seeking tax preparation assistance alongside basic financial services
diagnosis: California Check Cashing Stores is best for San Francisco residents who need immediate check cashing, bill payment, or money transfer services without a bank account, or working adults seeking small payroll advances up to $250. The primary caveat is that specific loan terms, APR rates, and fees are not disclosed—borrowers must visit a store or call to learn actual costs, and the company's own warning that small-dollar loans used long-term can be expensive suggests these products carry meaningful expense.
